────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

This is the MIT license text that applies to the vendored copies of React
and ReactDOM in this directory:

  - vendor/react.production.min.js
  - vendor/react-dom.production.min.js

Both files retain Meta's `@license React` header block at the top of the
source. This LICENSE-react.txt file is provided as the standalone copy of
the full MIT text, in addition to those inline headers, to preserve
attribution per the MIT terms.

The unmodified React source (and the corresponding LICENSE file in the
upstream repository) lives at:

  https://github.com/facebook/react

The vendored builds in this directory are unmodified copies of the published
production bundles, included so Plöttr can run from a static-file deploy
without an external CDN dependency.
